federal_land_actions.description: Convey selected National Forest System lands out of federal ownership subject to reservations, easements, and closing conditions.
Acquire non-federal lands for National Forest System management, access, habitat, recreation, and consolidation benefits.
Reserve public access, trail, road, mineral, and resource-protection interests where needed.

geography: Bridger, Bangtail, and Crazy Mountains Geographic Area
Madison, Henrys Lake, and Gallatin Mountains Geographic Area
project_name: East Crazy Inspiration Divide Land Exchange Proposed Action
proposed_action_summary: The Forest Service proposes a land exchange on the Custer Gallatin National Forest involving federal land disposal, non-federal land acquisition, access easements, deed restrictions, mineral reservations, trail and road access commitments, and resource-protection conditions. The action would affect National Forest System lands and lands entering federal ownership in the Crazy Mountains area.
